top_issues: Ribbed crewneck, cuffs, and waistband rendered in white instead of #0a0a0a, violating the all-black spec
Front rose logo includes hallucinated elements (grey leaves, cloud-like base) not in the spec
Logo executed as printed/embroidered patch rather than the specified tonal embossed black-on-black rose
Fabric reads shiny/lightweight rather than matte heavyweight cotton fleece
White contrast crewneck, sleeve cuffs, and visible lower hem/underlayer are not specified and break the all-black #0a0a0a requirement.
all_fixes: Render the entire sweatshirt, including ribbed crewneck, cuffs, and waistband, in dark black #0a0a0a.
Replace the front graphic with an embossed black rose with visible thorns and stem, centered on the chest at approximately 10 inches wide.
Remove gray/white logo coloring, cloud/base shapes, extra decorative leaves, white trim, and visible underlayer.
Use a matte heavyweight cotton fleece texture while preserving the regular crewneck sweatshirt silhouette.
Change the color of the collar, cuffs, and waistband to black (#0a0a0a).
Remove the grey leaves and cloud base from the front graphic.
Render the logo as an embossed tonal black design directly on the fabric as specified.
Re-render entire garment including all rib trims in solid #0a0a0a with no contrast panels or visible underlayer
Replace front graphic with a tonal embossed black rose featuring only thorns and stem, centered at ~10in wide, removing all extra leaves and base shapes
Adjust material shader to a matte heavyweight cotton fleece while preserving regular-fit crewneck silhouette

Rib trims and added white details create an unapproved contrast design.

issues: The ribbed collar, cuffs, and waistband are white instead of matching the black base color.
The logo includes grey leaves and a cloud-like base which were not specified.

issues: Ribbed crewneck, cuffs, and waistband rendered in white instead of #0a0a0a, violating the all-black spec
Front rose logo includes hallucinated elements (grey leaves, cloud-like base) not in the spec
Logo executed as printed/embroidered patch rather than the specified tonal embossed black-on-black rose
Fabric reads shiny/lightweight rather than matte heavyweight cotton fleece
suggested_fixes: Re-render entire garment including all rib trims in solid #0a0a0a with no contrast panels or visible underlayer
Replace front graphic with a tonal embossed black rose featuring only thorns and stem, centered at ~10in wide, removing all extra leaves and base shapes
Adjust material shader to a matte heavyweight cotton fleece while preserving regular-fit crewneck silhouette

synthesis.rationale: Both judges agree on the core failures: white contrast trims breaking the all-black spec and unspecified extra elements (cloud base, grey leaves) added to the rose logo. Judge 1 is more credible on logo_accuracy and construction since it correctly penalizes the print/embroidery rendering versus the required tonal emboss, and also catches the visible underlayer hallucination. Given multiple confirmed hallucinations on a luxury garment, I apply the veto and cap the overall below both judges' scores.

refine_prompt:
This is a Black Rose Crewneck (br-001) product render that scored 45/100 in QA review and needs correction.

CRITICAL: This render contains hallucinated decorative elements not in the spec. These must be completely removed. Do not introduce any new decorations, motifs, logos, text, or details that are not explicitly listed in the corrections below.

DEFECTS PRESENT IN CURRENT RENDER:
  - Ribbed crewneck, cuffs, and waistband rendered in white instead of #0a0a0a, violating the all-black spec
  - Front rose logo includes hallucinated elements (grey leaves, cloud-like base) not in the spec
  - Logo executed as printed/embroidered patch rather than the specified tonal embossed black-on-black rose
  - Fabric reads shiny/lightweight rather than matte heavyweight cotton fleece

REQUIRED CORRECTIONS:
  - Re-render entire garment including all rib trims in solid #0a0a0a with no contrast panels or visible underlayer
  - Replace front graphic with a tonal embossed black rose featuring only thorns and stem, centered at ~10in wide, removing all extra leaves and base shapes
  - Adjust material shader to a matte heavyweight cotton fleece while preserving regular-fit crewneck silhouette

Apply these corrections precisely. Preserve all unrelated elements unchanged. Do not add any decorations, text, logos, or details beyond what is explicitly required.

top_issues: Rose stem lacks distinctly rendered thorns as required by the spec
Single-judge evaluation only; second vision judge failed (TimeoutError), reducing confidence in the overall pass
all_fixes: Add more pronounced thorns to the rose stem to perfectly match the design specifications.
Re-render the embossed rose with more pronounced, clearly defined thorns along the stem to match the spec
Re-run the failed vision judge to obtain a second independent confirmation before final approval

issues: The rose stem does not distinctly show thorns as specified in the product spec.
suggested_fixes: Add more pronounced thorns to the rose stem to perfectly match the design specifications.

issues: Rose stem lacks distinctly rendered thorns as required by the spec
Single-judge evaluation only; second vision judge failed (TimeoutError), reducing confidence in the overall pass
suggested_fixes: Re-render the embossed rose with more pronounced, clearly defined thorns along the stem to match the spec

synthesis.rationale: Vision Judge 1 failed with a TimeoutError and produced no actual evaluation, so its zeros are non-signal and must be discarded. Judge 2 is the sole credible source and reports near-perfect compliance with one verified spec deviation: the rose's thorns are not distinctly rendered. I'm holding the overall slightly below Judge 2's 98 because we lack corroboration from a second judge and the thorn omission is a real, confirmed deviation from the spec on a hero design element.
